prompt:
An A5 hardbound mission logbook resting open on a tidy workbench, showing neatly ruled pages with subtle pre-numbered markers (not readable), a ribbon bookmark, and a pen clipped to the cover. Nearby are small maintenance items—a torque driver bit set, a labeled-but-unreadable equipment tag, and a compact sensor module—to communicate that this book is used for recording mission events and maintenance notes.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a clean near-future lab/workshop vibe: soft cinematic lighting, realistic leatherette cover texture, crisp paper fibers, no brand logos, and no readable text. Keep the logbook centered and visually unambiguous as an icon-like inventory item.
